keyInsights.title: ~60% carry-over rate
keyInsights.detail: About 60% of May-Aug 2026 Part 2 topics are recycled from previous seasons. Only ~37 out of 134 compiled topics appear truly new.

keyInsights.title: Most persistent topics
keyInsights.detail: "Movie You Watched/Enjoyed" and "Sport/Activity You Enjoy" appear in ALL 7 seasons — the most evergreen IELTS cue cards.

keyInsights.title: AI & Digital trend
keyInsights.detail: 2026 introduces AI ("Time You Used AI to Solve a Problem", "Person Who Is a Great Digital Communicator") and digital privacy as new themes.

keyInsights.title: Part 1 most stable
keyInsights.detail: "Art", "Science", "Parks", and "Gifts" appear in every single season (7/7). Safe bets for preparation.

recommendations: Prioritize the Top 20 Part 2 topics — they've appeared in 4–7 out of 7 seasons.
Balance preparation between evergreen topics and new 2026 additions (~28% new).
Build AI & tech vocabulary — new cue cards require domain terminology.
Master the 7 all-season Part 1 topics first — highest predictability.
